label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18

extraction.one_line_summary: LOPEZ Miguel Angel attacked from 32-rider breakaway to win atop Gamoniteiru, while ROGLIC took 2nd and bonus seconds overMAS to extend GC lead.
tactical_patterns: Bahrain Victorious set pace despite missing 32-rider break, HAIG hunting GC positions through attrition rather than break representation.
STORER prioritized KOM points over stage win despite being strongest breakaway rider, revealing DSM team competition between him and BARDET.
ROGLIC refused to chase LOPEZ for stage win but sprinted for 2nd place bonus seconds over MAS, revealing GC calculation priorities.
DE LA CRUZ asked STORER for cooperation on final climb but was refused, showing breakaway alliances fracture when teammate competition exists.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: dominated breakaway KOM sprints to overtake teammate BARDET in classification, signaling internal DSM hierarchy shift
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: set brutal pace for Bahrain despite missing break, suggesting GC podium ambition through elimination tactics
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: attacked final 2km from select chase group to take stage, narrowing gap to teammate MAS to just 23 seconds
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: sprinted for 2nd to take bonus seconds over MAS rather than conserve energy, extending lead to 2:30
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: unable to follow ROGLIC's sprint for bonus seconds despite both reaching final climb together
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: present in select chase group but invisible in finale, suggesting fatigue after Covadonga
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: moved into top 5 GC but showed no acceleration ability on final climb
